violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet wiping cloth was found on the Cinnabon counter. Wiping cloths should be stored in a sanitizing solution between uses or laundered.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving units in the walk-in cooler near Caribou and Cinnabon were found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the Pizza Hut prep table was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
Linen storage. — --Apron found stored on top of bags of hamburger buns near the prep sink. Used aprons should be laundered.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Opened Monster beverage was found in the Pizza Hut area. Personal items should be kept separated from items used for food service.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
